name: ai-media-router
description: Unified TypeScript SDK for multi-provider AI image, video, audio, and 3D generation.

scripts.release:publish: pnpm --filter @miragari/ai-media-router-core publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @miragari/ai-media-router-client publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @miragari/ai-media-router publish --access public --no-git-checks
